EmailTemplate.description: Email to use after trying to contact a quote and buy referral.
EmailTemplate.name: Referred Occupation Chase 1
EmailTemplate.subject: Business Insurance Quote Referral
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
Thanks for requesting a business insurance quote from Kingsbridge.
Due to your job role and industry, we require some more information in order to complete your quote.
I have been calling you today, so we can get the additional details we need from you. Unfortunately, I have not been able to reach you.
If you are still interested in moving forward, please give me a call on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to speaking with you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
